lines.speaker: Runa
lines.text: Would you like to try some fine Miscellanian ale, Your Royal Highness?

lines.speaker: Runa
lines.text: Well, I say Miscellanian, but it's actually brewed on the mainland.

lines.speaker: Runa
lines.text: Would you like to try some anyway?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's it like living down here?

lines.speaker: Runa
lines.text: Now, if only I hadn't taken a loss with the beer I sold to those teenagers.

lines.speaker: Runa
lines.text: Would you like to try some fine Miscellanian ale, Your Royal Highness?

lines.speaker: Runa
lines.text: Well, I say Miscellanian, but it's actually brewed on the mainland.

lines.speaker: Runa
lines.text: Would you like to try some anyway?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's it like living down here?

lines.speaker: Runa
lines.text: The dwarves living down here spend a lot of time and money in my inn.

lines.speaker: Runa
lines.text: One of them's been in here all day, and only bought one pint.

lines.speaker: Runa
lines.text: Could you ask him to at least order another drink?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll see what I can do.
